arts.ttl: Bayern Munich boss Vincent Kompany all positive about Hansi Flick and FC Barcelona
arts.sum: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany knows the storylines are out there ahead of his team’s Champions League match vs. Still, Kompany knows the recent history — including Bayern Munich’s infamous 8-2 throttling of FC Barcelona back in 2020.

arts.ttl: ‘Leader in world football’ – Bayern boss Kompany hails Barcelona youngster
arts.sum: Bayern Munich head coach Vincent Kompany has moved to reveal his appreciation for the talents of Barcelona star Pau Cubarsí. This, of course, comes ahead of the upcoming meeting between…

arts.ttl: Kimmich refuses to rule out Barca move ahead of UCL tie
arts.sum: Bayern Munich star Joshua Kimmich has refused to rule out a move to Barcelona amid continued speculation the Catalans would like to sign him. Asking about his future ahead of Wednesday’s clash with Barcelona, Kimmich had some interesting comments.

arts.ttl: Christoph Freund eager for Bayern Munich vs. FC Barcelona, Harry Kane vs. Robert Lewandowski in the Champions League
arts.sum: I think we can look forward to a very attractive football game,” said Freund (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ). Bayern Munich sporting director Christoph Freund is ready to see his club take on FC Barcelona in the Champions League .

arts.ttl: Ten Hag update: Man Utd 'hold talks' with Barcelona legend
arts.sum: Manchester United have reportedly held talks with Barcelona legend Xavi as they continue to identify possible replacements for Erik ten Hag. Ten Hag was widely expected to be sacked during the October international break, however INEOS opted to keep faith in the ex-Ajax boss following a crisis meeting at the start of the month.

arts.ttl: Team News: Barcelona vs. Bayern Munich injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's Champions League clash between Barcelona and Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Why could Barcelona's La Liga clash with Atletico Madrid take place in Miami?
arts.sum: Barcelona's La Liga fixture against Atletico Madrid could reportedly take place in Miami in what would be a controversial move.

arts.ttl: Kompany gives fresh update on Musiala ahead of Barcelona clash
arts.sum: Speaking at a press conference on Tuesday, FC Bayern coach Vincent Kompany was coy about Jamal Musiala's chances of starting against Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Kane scores hat-trick as Bayern thrash Stuttgart
arts.sum: Watch the highlights as England striker Harry Kane scores another hat-trick in the Bundesliga as Bayern Munich thrash VfB Stuttgart.
